title: Projects
content: Projects The following research projects are granted to the Department of Civil Engineering and align to Mission of CESTRD. Grant worth Rs. 25Lakhs received from HPDDMA for investigation on project "Geological Hazards Mitigation using Stone Concrete Block Retaining Wall and Helical Soil Nailing" Source(s) of Grant: Himachal Pradesh District Disaster and Management Authority, Received in 2021, project duration 3 years
